text: The highways on the national system of interstate and defense highways and federal-aid primary system highways that are designated by the commissioner of transportation pursuant to § 1627 (Designation of qualifying highways and access highways) .
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 1
#### Article 1. Words & Phrases Defined
##### § 134-A — Qualifying highway

The highways on the national system of interstate and defense highways and federal-aid primary system highways that are designated by the commissioner of transportation pursuant to § 1627 (Designation of qualifying highways and access highways) .

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
